description:
# Proactive Maintenance

Self-healing operations — stale resources auto-cleanup, PRs auto-rebase, worktrees auto-prune.

## Phases
1. Auto-cleanup stale worktrees and branches
2. Auto-rebase stale PRs
title: [Epic] Proactive Maintenance
